---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a safe defensive feature for WebShield
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you want to add.

## Security Scope

Confirm that this feature is defensive and non-destructive.

- [ ] This does not add exploitation logic.
- [ ] This does not add brute force or credential attack behavior.
- [ ] This does not add WAF bypass or evasion behavior.
- [ ] This does not enable mass scanning.

## Use Case

Who needs this and why?

## Expected Behavior

What should WebShield do?

## Suggested Output

What finding, report section, or CLI output should be generated?

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or screenshots if useful.
